nodes.summary: Hume's white-eye（Zosterops auriventer）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Hume's white-eye。

nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Hume's white-eye
nodes.summary: Hume's white-eye (Zosterops auriventer) is a bird species in the family Zosteropidae. It is found in upland areas of Myanmar, southern Thailand, the Malay Peninsula and Borneo. This species was formerly treated as a subspecies of the Indian white-eye (Zosterops palpebrosus). Based on a study published as two articles in 2017, it was promoted to species rank. Included as subspecies are two taxa that were previously treated as subspecies of Everett's white-eye (Zosterops everetti). There are four subspecies: Z. a. auriventer Hume, 1878 – southeast Myanmar (Tenasserim Hills) Z. a. tahanensis (Ogilvie-Grant, 1906) – central and south Malay Peninsula Z. a. wetmorei (Deignan, 1943) – south Thailand, north Malay Peninsula Z. a. medius Robinson & Kloss, 1923 – Borneo It is omnivorous. References
